base_prompt_prefix: masterpiece, best quality, very aesthetic, 2d game item icon, single centered object, clean readable silhouette, crisp dark outline, bright fantasy RPG style, simple studio background, game-ready icon readability
negative_prompt: nsfw, lowres, text, watermark, logo, signature, username, blurry, cropped, cut off, jpeg artifacts, worst quality, low quality, unfinished, abstract, photorealistic, realistic photo, messy scene, hand, character, multiple objects, flat green background

camera_rules.item_icon: single isolated object only, centered orthographic icon view, no scenery, no cast shadow, simple neutral background for segmentation
camera_rules.skill_icon: single isolated readable magic symbol, centered, no text, simple neutral background for segmentation
